honesty: No external execution, no new seals, no registry mutation, no external-doc batch sync.

external_map.value: Highest external trust leverage: proves a third-party repository can gate changes on the current QPGF root and seal badge.
uses_w12_21: c12x/cmul2_mod3683 as latest frontier regression target
external_map.blocker: external repository access or target repository path is not provided
external_map.unblock_input: 정욱님 provides a repository/path and permission to add or adapt CI files
external_map.first_action_when_unblocked: create a repo-local CI pilot package that runs reproduce_all or seal_gate_ci with expect-root 1134ea04099ea0c1
acceptance_when_executed: CI config is scoped to the target repository
failure mode blocks merge or reports red badge
no external seal is trusted without local recomputation

external_map.value: Strongest identity hardening: binds runtime submissions to public keys so multi-identity Sybil behavior is detectable.
uses_w12_21: latest c12x frontier seal as a high-cost identity-bound submission example
current oracle fingerprints and registry root as signature payload fields
external_map.blocker: real runtime public keys/signatures are not available
external_map.unblock_input: runtime pubkeys or permission to define a local demo key ceremony
external_map.first_action_when_unblocked: define signed submission bundle {runtime_pubkey, signature, nonce, registry_root, artifact_id, u_hash}
acceptance_when_executed: same pubkey collapses to one independence unit
demo keys are clearly labeled if real keys are not used

external_map.value: Adds execution-side evidence without weakening seal semantics; useful for adoption but must remain OBSERVATION.
uses_w12_21: cmul2_mod3683 as the candidate backend observation app
external_map.blocker: Aer noise setup or real QPU access is not provided
external_map.unblock_input: backend target, shot budget, noise model or QPU access constraints
external_map.first_action_when_unblocked: create OBSERVATION sidecar for cmul2_mod3683 with backend metadata and explicit non-seal label
acceptance_when_executed: report distinguishes execution evidence from unitary equivalence

external_map.value: Tests consensus robustness on real weak-model lineage data; important but less directly unlocked by W12.21 than CI/runtime/backend paths.
uses_w12_21: current root can anchor the validation corpus
no direct dependency on c12x arithmetic frontier
external_map.blocker: real weak-model poisoned-lineage panel data is not available
external_map.unblock_input: panel outputs from weak or poisoned runtimes with lineage metadata
external_map.first_action_when_unblocked: run rho-discount validation against collected panel data and compare with constructed co-error controls
acceptance_when_executed: natural co-error data is separated from constructed co-error tests
rho-discount pass/fail is reported without overclaiming

external_map.value: Potentially high productization value, but currently undefined; wrong interpretation could create architectural drift.
uses_w12_21: current root and frontier evidence can be served or queried once scope is defined
external_map.unblock_input: 정욱님 chooses one scope: oracle API, registry browser/API, backend runner relay, or external CI webhook
external_map.first_action_when_unblocked: write a scoped ServerLink PGF design with authority boundaries and no secret handling in repo
acceptance_when_executed: scope is a single chosen path
server does not become a seal authority

next_decision.if_no_external_input: pause autonomous frontier growth; report blocked external queue

explicit_non_goals: (2026-06-30 정욱님 전면 승인) autonomy-constraints removed: c13x/payoff/shor3683/external-docs-sync are all autonomously executable by the loop
retained (NOT a prohibition, trust basis): oracle fingerprint 2 files (verify_seal.py, contracts.py) stay unmodified — editing invalidates all seals
